title: Classic Pork Gyro
description: A traditional Greek-inspired dish featuring tender pork, crunchy veggies, and creamy tzatziki sauce. Enjoy as a satisfying dinner or lunch option.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Season the pork belly with salt and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 63°C.
Let the pork rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Meanwhile, prepare the tzatziki sauce by combining Greek yogurt, cucumber, onion, and olive oil in a bowl.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the gyro by spreading tzatziki sauce on the pita, followed by sliced pork, tomato, lettuce, and onion.
